title: Oval Bonsai Container
description:
ClaycrazE — Oval Bonsai Vessel
Cornwall Stone Glaze, Cone 10 Oxidation

A quietly expressive piece with a restrained, mineral-forward profile. The surface opens with soft notes of celadon green, drifting toward sea-glass and weathered jade, layered over a warm, bone-white interior that grounds the composition.

Along the rim, a gentle pooling suggests a light reduction-like depth—unexpected in oxidation—offering hints of moss, damp stone, and a trace of coastal air. The exterior carries a subtle vertical texture, catching the glaze in fine striations that read like wind over sand or the grain of aged wood.

At the base, the glaze breaks to reveal iron-rich undertones—earth, clay, and a whisper of fire—adding a dry, tactile finish that contrasts the satin softness above.

The foot is left honest and direct, the clay body speaking clearly, with a slight irregularity that reinforces the handmade character and quiet confidence of the form.

Balanced, contemplative, and unforced—
a vessel that favors presence over statement, and rewards a slower look.
